explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: A press release details the AI-powered capabilities of the 'Maximo' robot, describing its use of computer vision for precise panel placement and generative AI for image reconstruction. Additionally, a website explicitly mentions the use of AI software solutions, artificial intelligence, and machine learning for automation in both the Maximo solar robot and the Max IQ intelligence platform, stating their capabilities.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. It details the AI-powered capabilities of the 'Maximo' robot, including its use of computer vision for precise panel placement and generative AI for image reconstruction. By describing these specific AI features and how they function, the announcement offers transparency regarding the robot's operational mechanisms.
relevant_sources.title: AES Launches First AI-Enabled Solar Installation Robot

relevant_sources.summary: The Maxrobotics Website provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. This is demonstrated by the website's explicit mention of AI software solutions, artificial intelligence, and machine learning being used for automation in their solar robot, Maximo, and their intelligence platform, Max IQ. While the website clearly states the use of AI and its capabilities, it does not provide specific operational or policy details.
relevant_sources.title: Maxrobotics Website

summary.overall_findings: AES's published materials include a press release detailing the AI-powered capabilities of the 'Maximo' robot, alongside another describing its use of computer vision for precise panel placement. These disclosures address transparency, the only one of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars with documented evidence, drawing from 13 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
